arts.ttl: 'Man Utd must be hungrier to score'
arts.sum: Ashley Williams says Manchester United's players "must be hungrier" and "go with a bit of meaning" in front of goal following their 1-0 defeat against Wolves.

arts.ttl: Manchester United set for transfer battle with Manchester City for Ligue 1 winger 'wanted by Paris Saint-Germain'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim may have to fend off competition from Manchester City and Paris Saint-Germain for a Ligue 1 winger.

arts.ttl: Saint-Etienne fans send Man United cheeky message as tempers flare in Ligue 1 clash with Lyon
arts.sum: Fierce rivals Saint-Etienne and Lyon have met this evening just days after Man United defeated the visitors in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man Utd monitor Leipzig's Simons - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to holds talks about the futures of Luis Diaz, Ibrahima Konate and Diogo Jota, Liverpool and Manchester United keen on RB Leipzig winger Xavi Simons, Moise Kean could stay at Fiorentina despite interest from Premier League clubs, plus more.

arts.ttl: Matheus Cunha's bizarre move gives Man United transfer clue before Ruben Amorim exchange
arts.sum: Wolves forward Matheus Cunha has been among the names linked with a summer move to Manchester United and his behaviour at Old Trafford on Sunday has only fueled those rumours.

arts.ttl: Five Players Who Ruined their Legacy at Man United [Ranked]
arts.sum: The five players who ruined their legacy at Manchester United have been named including Marcus Rashford and Cristiano Ronaldo.

arts.ttl: Ex-Man Utd starlet's daughter pays heartbreaking tribute after tragic death aged 36
arts.sum: Former Manchester United academy player, Joe Thompson, died this week following a third battle with cancer and tributes from the football family have flooded in

arts.ttl: Roy Keane gives honest Ruud van Nistelrooy verdict as Manchester United icon is relegated
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker, assistant manager and caretaker Ruud van Nistelrooy has been relegated from the Premier League with Leicester City

arts.ttl: Richard Keys Ridiculed For Suggesting Man Utd Replace Ruben Amorim With Former PL Boss
arts.sum: On beIN Sports, Andy Gray was quick to hit back at Richard Keys' suggestion for a Ruben Amorim replacement at Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd & Man City battle PSG for €80m Ligue 1 star
arts.sum: Man Utd & Man City are both credited with interest in Monaco winger Maghnes Akliouche.
